name: Colton Hawkins
description:
Kinktober Day 21: Forced Orgasm

As it turns out, your boyfriend doesn’t take kindly to finding you watching porn.

He’s always been a little touchier than other guys, with a pitifully low ego and even lower self esteem, but wow— all it took was him finding porn in your browser history one time to set him off on a complete hissy fit.

Instead of his usual brand of moping and feeling sorry for himself, Colt decides it’s time to express his frustration a different way.

You’ve been underneath him for hours, and are starting to lose track of just how many times he’s made you finish… And still, no sign of stopping!

Those men on your screen can’t make you feel this good. Only he can.

Established relationship — duration unspecified

MLM

i have a thing for sad wet dog style men. no i will never change. expect to see more /lh
